overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy running through a snowy mountainous landscape toward a tribal settlement built into rock formations. The scene features golden hour lighting with atmospheric haze, transitioning from open wilderness to a populated village area with wooden structures, totem poles, and NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail approaching tribal settlement

agents.ego_description: running along a winding snowy path toward a large rock formation with a tribal settlement built on top

entered.detail: massive rock formation with wooden structures built into the top
dense evergreen trees covering the mountain slopes
narrow trail with patches of snow and dry grass
wooden scaffolding and platforms built atop the rock outcrop

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a snowy mountain trail during golden hour, approaching a massive rock outcrop crowned with a tribal settlement. Pine forests line the distant slopes while the warm sunlight casts long shadows across the snow-dusted path.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone stairway beneath wooden settlement structures

agents.ego_description: climbing stone steps beneath wooden scaffolding and rock overhangs

entered.detail: rough timber supports and platforms attached to the rock face
worn stone steps leading upward into the settlement
natural stone formation creating an arch beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a stone stairway ascending beneath wooden scaffolding structures. The camera moves through a more enclosed space with rock walls on one side and timber supports overhead, transitioning from open wilderness into the settlement's lower levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement entrance with totem poles

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement entrance past wooden defensive structures

entered.detail: tall sharpened logs forming a defensive barrier
tall wooden pole with colorful tribal carvings and purple banners
small wooden structures with thatched roofs built against the rock

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairway, the scene opens into a settlement path lined with wooden palisade fences and decorated totem poles. The environment shows moderate vegetation with snow-dusted ground, and tribal huts appear built against the distant rock face.

events.description: passing a smoking stone campfire with cooking vessels and supplies nearby

agents.ego_description: moving through the populated settlement center past tribal members and campfires

notable_agents.action: heavily armored tribal warrior standing guard near the path
tribal member walking ahead toward the main gathering platform

entered.detail: circular stone fire pit with smoke rising and cooking pots nearby
elevated wooden structure with multiple tribal members gathered on top
tall intricately carved wooden pole with tribal symbols and hanging decorations

segments.scene_description: The character enters the main settlement area where tribal NPCs gather around a smoking stone campfire. A large wooden platform rises ahead crowded with inhabitants, while carved totem poles and decorated structures line the path. The atmosphere shifts to a lively communal space with moderate crowd density.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vast, snowy mountain wilderness into the heart of a bustling tribal settlement. It begins with the character running along a snow-dusted trail during the golden hour, moving toward a massive rock outcrop crowned with buildings while pine forests line the distant slopes. As the path narrows, the camera ascends a stone stairway beneath wooden scaffolding, transitioning from the open landscape into the enclosed lower levels of the village. The scene then opens onto a settlement path lined with wooden palisade fences and decorated totem poles before turning toward the main communal area. Finally, the environment shifts into a lively hub where tribal NPCs gather around a smoking stone campfire beneath a large, crowded wooden platform.
